meaning: n.[希神]门特(良师益友),贤明的顾问,导师,指导者
examples: Leon Sullivan was my mentor and my friend.
Eventually, he was excommunicated along with his mentor.
So, over the fierce objections of his mentor Hofmann, he left college to give birth to the modern chemical industry.
Luckily, she had an uncle qualified and ready to play mentor and eventually financier.
Young Singh found a mentor in George Hoddy, founder of Universal Electric in Michigan, a joint-venture partner.
